summary: coin pop-curve probes the HTTP response cache before the quota gate so cached grades aren't counted as live calls.
reason: The pre-flight quota check used len(tuples), blocking the command even when every grade was already served from the 5-minute HTTP cache. New behavior probes c.IsCached() per tuple to compute an accurate liveCalls count, and the error message now reports both cached and live counts. Greptile P2 finding on PR #630.
